citation.sourceDocument: Iowa Department of Revenue, flat 3.8% individual income tax for tax years 2025 and after (Senate File 2442, 2024)
citation.sourceNote: Replaces the prior graduated schedule. Iowa conforms to the federal standard deduction (the Idaho/Colorado pattern), $16,100/$32,200/$24,150 for 2026. Cross-checked against the Tax Foundation 2026 state table. Iowa's $40 single / $80 married personal-exemption credit (a small flat nonrefundable credit) and the opt-in local school-district surtaxes are omitted at launch fidelity, like every state's credits and county/municipal add-ons, so the figure errs slightly high (by at most $40/$80) — the conservative side for setting money aside.
